blocked_claims: draft or preview persistence in an external system
publish, send, delete, follow, pay, schedule, upload, or submit actions
live write execution or write success evidence

blocked_now: submitting changes to an external site
claiming validation success as write success
storing live account or runtime state
requires_before_admission: Harbor target binding and evidence reference contract

blocked_now: saving draft content to an external service

deferred_until: repair hint and rollback policy are accepted
explicit user confirmation flow is accepted
a later Work Item authorizes true write package scope

must_reject_if: package operation_mode is validate_only, draft, preview, or write and claims executable write behavior
package declares external submit, publish, send, delete, follow, pay, schedule, upload, or save steps
package stores credential material, account state, live runtime state, raw evidence, production payload, or user business data
package omits future action risk, confirmation, target binding, idempotency, expected-change, post-check, unknown-outcome, or repair contracts while claiming write behavior

consumer_boundary: Core may read this file to fail closed on non-target write-side claims. This file does not authorize Core, App, Harbor, or Lode to execute write behavior.
non_goals: No Core, Harbor, or App code change.
No hosted registry, marketplace, sync service, crawler queue, or benchmark contract.
No cookies, tokens, account state, runtime session state, raw evidence bodies, complete DOM, HAR, screenshots, production payloads, or user business data.
